overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning on an elevated pedestrian walkway with neon advertisements, passing through a narrow alley alongside an automated parking structure, descending to street level, and continuing along a busy urban street with futuristic vehicles and glowing storefronts under massive overpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with teal railings and neon advertisements

events.description: pedestrian in white tank top passes close to camera on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway, passing neon billboards and vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top and sunglasses walking toward the camera

entered.detail: turquoise metal railings lining both sides of the elevated walkway
large illuminated advertisement featuring a red character on white background
tall automated parking garage with multiple stacked vehicle platforms visible
industrial metal scaffolding structure at the end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered elevated pedestrian walkway with distinctive teal safety railings. Neon billboards and advertisements illuminate the right side while a massive multi-level parking structure looms on the left. The camera moves forward past a pedestrian in a white tank top, with metal scaffolding visible at the walkway's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between parking structure and commercial buildings

events.description: emerging from covered walkway into alley with more direct sky visibility between tall buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrow alley, occasionally looking up at the stacked cars in the parking structure

entered.detail: smooth concrete wall of the parking structure with horizontal metal railings
blank white digital screen mounted on the building facade
tall modern glass and steel skyscraper towering above the alley

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow alley flanked by the parking structure on the left and commercial buildings on the right. The lighting shifts to a mix of artificial and natural light from above. The camera moves past a large blank white screen on the right wall while the parking structure with its visible stacked cars dominates the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered vendor area with stairs descending to street level

events.description: entering covered vendor area with green canopy and supply boxes
descending metal stairs toward the street level exit

agents.ego_description: walking down through a covered vendor area and descending stairs to reach street level

notable_agents.action: man in yellow plaid shirt walking up the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: green metal canopy over a vendor stall with stacked cardboard boxes
metal grate flooring on the stairs and platform area
rusted yellow electrical utility boxes with graffiti

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a semi-covered vendor area with a green canopy and supply boxes, then descends metal stairs toward street level. A man in a plaid shirt walks up the stairs in the opposite direction. Yellow utility boxes and metal grate flooring characterize this transitional space between the elevated walkway and the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban street under elevated highway with neon storefronts

events.description: exiting the alley onto the main city street with vehicle traffic and neon signs
crossing the orange patterned crosswalk as futuristic vehicles drive by

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk under massive overpasses, observing the traffic and neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving along the multi-lane street

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass spanning across the street above
distinctive orange and gray geometric patterned pedestrian crossing
bright green neon sign reading 'softsys' on the building facade
various futuristic cars driving on the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a bustling urban street beneath massive highway overpasses. The camera crosses an orange patterned crosswalk and continues along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and observing futuristic vehicles on the road. Neon signs including a prominent 'softsys' sign illuminate the street, while the architecture features towering glass and steel buildings typical of Night City's urban core.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit elevated walkway down into the gritty depths of a city alleyway and finally to street level. It begins on a covered pedestrian path defined by teal safety railings and glowing billboards, moving past a pedestrian toward metal scaffolding. As the camera advances, the scene shifts into a narrow alley where the lighting becomes a mix of artificial glow and natural light, flanked by a massive parking structure filled with stacked cars and a blank white screen. The path then leads through a semi-covered vendor area under a green canopy, before the camera descends a set of metal stairs past a man in a plaid shirt. The movement concludes as the camera reaches the street level, passing yellow utility boxes and metal grate flooring.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense urban corridor beneath the looming shadows of massive highway overpasses. It begins by crossing an orange patterned crosswalk, moving steadily along a bustling sidewalk filled with pedestrians. As the camera advances, the view opens up to reveal futuristic vehicles gliding along the road, framed by towering glass and steel architecture. The scene then shifts focus toward the vibrant glow of the city's commercial district, passing under a prominent neon softsys sign that illuminates the surrounding urban core.
